drl:
rule "R0"
agenda-group "ga"
when
    $p0_0 : T2($b0_0_0 : f3)
    exists(T2($g0_1 : f0) and T1(f1 == $g0_1))
    $p0_2 : T1($b0_2_0 : f0)
then
end
rule "R1"
salience -2
when
    T2(f1 > 100, $b1_0_0 : f0)
    T2(f2 == 6, $b1_1_0 : f0)
    T3(f0 contains "ab", $b1_2_0 : f1)
then
end
rule "R2"
when
    ( T2(f1 > 100, $b2_0_0 : f0) and T2(f2 == 6, $b2_1_0 : f0) and T3(f1 <= 0.0, $b2_2_0 : f3) )
    or
    ( T2(f0 == false, $b2_0_0 : f0) and T2(f1 > 12, $b2_1_0 : f0) and T3(f1 == 11, $b2_2_0 : f3) )
then
end
rule "R3"
salience($b3_0_1 - 0)
when
    T3(f2 <= 1.5, $b3_0_0 : f1, $b3_0_1 : f2)
    T3()
then
end
rule "R4"
salience -3
when
    T0($b4_0_0 : f2, $b4_0_1 : f2)
then
    drools.setFocus("ga");
    insert(new T2($b4_0_1, 0, 1, true));
    insert(new T1("", true));
end
rule "R5"
salience 9
when
    $p5_0 : T2()
then
    insertLogical(new T3("zz", $p5_0.getF1(), $p5_0.getF1(), true));
    insertLogical(new T3("alpha", 0.0, 6.0, false));
end
